mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT F.FLIGHT_ID AS flightId, F.AIRLINE AS airline, F.DEPARTURE AS departure, F.ARRIVAL AS arrival, F.FLIGHT_TYPE AS flightType, F.DEPART_TIME AS departTime, F.ARRIVE_TIME AS arriveTime, F.DURATION AS duration, F.PRICE AS price, F.SEAT_CLASS AS seatClass, F.FLIGHT_DATE AS flightDate, COUNT(R.RESERVATION_ID) AS resvCount FROM TRV_FLIGHT F LEFT JOIN TRV_RESERVATION R ON F.FLIGHT_ID = R.FLIGHT_ID GROUP BY F.FLIGHT_ID, F.AIRLINE, F.DEPARTURE, F.ARRIVAL, F.FLIGHT_TYPE, F.DEPART_TIME, F.ARRIVE_TIME, F.DURATION, F.PRICE, F.SEAT_CLASS, F.FLIGHT_DATE ORDER BY resvCount DESC, F.FLIGHT_DATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT FLIGHT_ID AS flightId, AIRLINE AS airline, DEPARTURE AS departure, ARRIVAL AS arrival, FLIGHT_TYPE AS flightType, DEPART_TIME AS departTime, ARRIVE_TIME AS arriveTime, DURATION AS duration, PRICE AS price, SEAT_CLASS AS seatClass, FLIGHT_DATE AS flightDate FROM TRV_FLIGHT WHERE FLIGHT_ID = #{flightId}
